inspector.title: Visual inspector
inspector.invalidated_production: excluded from training: battery full + export disabled
inspector.today_training_note: Today is not used for training yet, and invalidated points are not reflected in today's actual production view.
inspector.no_profile: No trained profile is available yet. Raw forecast and actual history can still be shown when available.
inspector.no_data: No data is available for {date}. Try a newer day or refresh after the next forecast update.
inspector.no_explainability: This profile predates stored explainability. Run training again to see contribution rows.
inspector.no_slot_explainability: No training explainability is available for {slot}.
